sources.notes: Offline synthetic FHIR scans (scan_1.json / scan_2.json). Deterministic; no network. Default scan source.
Public HAPI FHIR R4 test server. Default live FHIR_BASE_URL.
Local HAPI FHIR server (e.g. Synthea-loaded). Active when running locally.
SMART-on-FHIR OAuth2 launch for real EHR sandboxes. Not wired yet.
CDS Hooks service integration for workflow-triggered cards. Not wired yet.
Health Canada Drug Product Database. Reference lookup, not patient data.
Canadian Clinical Drug Data set. Terminology/coding reference.
MIMIC-IV critical-care dataset. Research/eval corpus, credentialed access.
MTSamples transcribed clinical notes. Text corpus for extraction eval.
